about.title: Trusted Global Trade Partner
about.p1: Nanning Kazan Trading Co., Ltd (南宁市卡赞商贸有限公司) is a dynamic international trading company headquartered in Nanning, Guangxi Province, China.
about.p2: We specialize in the export and import of a wide range of goods, connecting reliable suppliers and buyers across continents. Years of experience in international markets enable us to ensure effective cooperation between partners from Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and Central Asia.
about.p3: We serve a wide range of industries, including transportation, construction, agriculture, energy, and many others. Our team of experts has many years of experience in the fuel and trading industries and is always ready to help clients solve their challenges. We offer competitive prices and an individual approach that takes into account the unique needs of each partner.
about.p4: We strive to provide environmentally friendly and sustainable solutions in the fuel industry, working closely with trusted suppliers to ensure our products meet international safety and environmental standards. Our goal is to provide clients with the highest quality fuel and raw materials: reliable, affordable, and environmentally safe.

products.title: Our Products & Services
products.subtitle: From energy commodities to industrial materials, we supply a comprehensive range of products to clients worldwide under flexible delivery terms.
products.oil.name: Oil & Petroleum Products
products.oil.desc: Diesel fuel, gasoline, fuel oil. Delivery: CIF, FOB, DLC/SBLC. Docs: POP, SGS, CIQ, Bill of Lading.
products.chemicals.name: Chemicals & Industrial Materials
products.chemicals.desc: Fertilizers, reagents, plastics, chemical raw materials, sodium bicarbonate, soda ash, caustic soda.
products.metallurgy.name: Metallurgy & Raw Materials
products.metallurgy.desc: Iron, copper, aluminum ores. Steel, cast iron, ferrous scrap. Copper, aluminum, lead, zinc non-ferrous metals.
products.agricultural.name: Agricultural Grains
products.agricultural.desc: Wheat, corn, soybean, rice, sunflower seeds, and other agricultural commodities. Quality certified.
products.textiles.name: Textiles & Light Industry
products.textiles.desc: Fabrics, clothing, footwear, accessories. International quality standards, custom orders available.
products.automotive.name: Automotive & Auto Parts
products.automotive.desc: Engines, filters, brake systems, tires, batteries. Certified components for passenger and commercial vehicles.
products.machinery.name: Machinery & Equipment
products.machinery.desc: All kinds of machine tools, industrial equipment, and heavy machinery for diverse sectors.
products.sulfur.name: Granulated & Lump Sulfur
products.sulfur.desc: Sulfur in various fractions. Used in chemical industry, agriculture, and fertilizer production.
products.other.name: Other Products
products.other.desc: Ability to supply any other categories upon customer request. Contact us for custom sourcing.
